title: Stylish Cinematic Street Style Portrait Tall Young
sourceTitle: Stylish Cinematic Street Style Portrait Tall Young
prompt: A stylish cinematic street-style portrait of a tall young man with dark wavy hair, trimmed beard, and small oval sunglasses, leaning casually against a textured black stone building facade in an urban setting. He wears a dark olive-brown leather jacket over a fitted black turtleneck, high-waisted chocolate brown tailored trousers with a leather belt, and dark burgundy chunky loafers. Moody luxury fashion aesthetic, warm ambient lighting from the interior café behind him, relaxed confident pose with hands in pockets, editorial menswear photography, shallow depth of field, muted earthy color palette, ultra-realistic, high detail, soft natural shadows.
